items.title: Get 800 free credits. Welcome to my AI image and video generation website.
items.summary: The last time I posted here, I asked for help figuring out why the AI-generated website（voloshow). I had spent months building wasn’t getting any customers. I’m really grateful for all the replies I got. Many people shared their thoughts and pointed out technical issues and UX problems on the site, which helped me a lot. I’ve recently made another round of improvements to the website, and I’d love for everyone to try it again. Please leave your thoughts and feedback below, Thank you, truly. *********************** Please log in to the website, select “Upgrade Plan,” then enter the redemption code 【voloshowplus】 in the top-right corner and click “Redeem.” The system will give you 800 credits, which you can use on the website. Limited to 30 spots. First come, first served. *********************** Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48472902 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
